completedImprovements.title: Q-NEW46c repeated Analyst RCA no longer reports CPU=0% from session context
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.53 production repeated storage-nfs-dc1-01 disk RCA returned Disk 93%, CPU 58%, Memory 42% and did not report CPU=0%.

expertAssessments.rationale: The targeted regression was reproduced on the same production AI sidebar surface and the repeated RCA no longer carries the false CPU=0% value. Generic anomaly wording still uses a clarification step, but it no longer misroutes to metric-current and the all-target Analyst path is functional.

notes: GitLab release pipeline 2554097149 succeeded for v8.12.53.
Cloud Run ai-engine revision ai-engine-00561-rc5 serves 100% traffic with cpu=1 and memory=512Mi; /health reports version 8.12.53; unauthenticated /monitoring returns 403 as expected.

Local validation before release: ai-engine type-check PASS, ai-engine tests PASS (145 files / 1563 tests), targeted tests PASS, line-guard PASS with 47 warnings / 0 fails, git diff --check PASS, Docker preflight build PASS on 900s retry.

Q-NEW46a remains a UX clarification behavior rather than an active misrouting regression: direct generic wording asks for confirmation at 80% confidence; selecting all-target execution returns Analyst anomaly evidence.
